reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content:
더 귀엽게 돌아온 헤잇미 밴드는 착용이 쉽고 털어도 빠지지 않는 고정형 밴드라 잃어버릴 걱정 없이 사용 가능했어요!

해충이 싫어하는 시트로넬라 오일이 함유되어 야외활동을 좋아하고 풀을 좋아하는 저희집 강아지들도 헤잇미 밴드를 필수로 착용하여 해충으로부터 더더욱 안전한 산책을 할 수 있었어요🦟🪰🚫

13g으로 무겁지 않아 소형견 친구들부터 산책을 좋아하는 모든 크기의 친구들이 사용할 수 있어요 사진속 18kg 중형견에게도 작지 않은 사이즈라 강추랍니다🐻‍❄️🩷
reviews.content_en:
HATE ME band has made a cuter comeback! It's easy to put on and stays secure without falling off even with tugging, so you can use it without worrying about losing it!

With citronella oil that bugs hate, my pups who love outdoor activities and grass can wear HATE ME band as a must-have during walks for extra safe protection from insects 🦟🪰🚫

At 13g, it's not heavy, so it works for small breeds and dogs of all sizes who love walking. It's a good size even for my 18kg medium-sized pup in the photo, so I highly recommend it! 🐻‍❄️🩷

reviews.name: 감자
reviews.content:
감자는 노란색으로 착용해봤어요 ~ :)
✅ 바잇미 헤잇미 밴드를 구매할 수 밖에 없는 이유!
일단 곰돌이 디자인이 너무 귀여워서 장식용으로 달고 다니고 싶을 정도로 너무 귀여워요..
다른 제품도 써봤는데 보통 원형 디자인이어서 특별하지 않았는데 이번 헤잇미 밴드가 가장 귀여웠어요ㅎㅎ
✅ 처음에 개봉하자마자 향이 되게 강했어요, 구충은 매달 하지만 헤잇미 밴드를 꼭 차고 나가야 산책할 때 조금 더 안심이 되는 것 같아요!
💛💚🩵🩷
컬러별로 쟁여놓고 올여름 내내 하네스 컬러에 맞춰서 하고다닐것 같아요~
reviews.content_en:
Gamja tried it on in yellow! ~ :)
✅ Why you HAVE to get BITE ME HATE ME band!
First, the bear design is so cute that I want to wear it just as a decoration.. it's adorable 💕
I've tried other products but they usually had a plain circular design, so this HATE ME band was the cutest!! ㅎㅎ
✅ Right when I opened it, the scent was really strong. I do deworming every month, but I feel more reassured on walks when Gamja wears the HATE ME band!
💛💚🩵🩷
I'm going to line up all the colors and match them with my harness colors all summer long~

reviews.name: 꼬미
reviews.content:
산책할때마다 벌레때문에 걱정이 많아서 오래 킁카킁카 하게 하고싶어도 어쩔 수 없이 그만하라고 하는 상황이 오곤 했어요. 반려견 몸에 직접적으로 뿌리거나 바르지 않아도 되서 좋아요. 그만큼 발향력은 확실한..!!
이번에 새로 나온 헤잇미 패치랑 깔맞춤으로 해주면 너무 귀여워요 ㅠㅠ 곰돌이 파티
헤잇미랑 행복한 산책시간 될고가타요
reviews.content_en:
I used to worry so much about bugs every walk that even if I wanted to let him sniff and explore, I'd have to cut it short. I love that I don't have to spray or apply anything directly on my pup's body. And the scent throw is definitely strong..!!
The new HATE ME patch matches so well with the band and it's so cute ㅠㅠ A bear party!
Walks with HATE ME will be happy times~

reviews.name: 설이
reviews.content: 설이한테 찰떡인 노란색 밴드로 골랐어요 💛 퍼컬이 노란색이라서요 (속닥) 🤭 곰돌이 디자인으로 업그레이드 되었는데 진짜 귀엽습니다 ㅎㅎㅎ 지퍼백 열었을 때, 향이 엄청 강하게 나더라구요 ! 발향력이 좋아서 안심되었어요 !! 컬러별로 쟁여두고 한달에 한번씩 교체하려구요 🐻 여름 산책은 헤잇미와~~~~🙌
reviews.content_en: I chose the yellow band that's perfect for Seol 💛 because Purrcul is yellow too (psst) 🤭 It's been upgraded to a bear design and it's really cute ㅎㅎㅎ When I opened the zipper bag, the scent was super strong! I felt reassured because the scent throw is great!! I'm keeping different colors and planning to replace it once a month 🐻 Summer walks are with HATE ME~~~~🙌

reviews.name: 밥풀
reviews.content: 벌써 날씨가 더워지면서 벌레들이 스물스물 기어나오는..! 😱 바로 하네스에 헤잇미 밴드부터 착용해줬어요 ~~! 헤잇미 밴드는 작년부터 꾸준히 착용하고 있는 제품인데요 이번에 곰돌이 모양으로 더더 귀엽게 변신했더라구요 ! 헤잇미 밴드 달고 패치도 붙이고 스프레이까지 뿌리면 여름 산책은 완전 무장입니당 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ 다들 진드기 무서워서 풀숲 못가게 하잖아요..! 밥풀이는 헤잇미 시리즈 덕분인지 진드기가 붙어온 적은 없었답니다 ?! 🫶
reviews.content_en: As the weather's getting warmer, bugs are starting to creep out..! 😱 I put the HATE ME band on the harness right away~~! I've been consistently using HATE ME band since last year, and this time it's gotten even cuter with the bear shape! When you put on the HATE ME band, attach the patch, and spray it too, summer walks are fully armed ㅋㅋㅋㅋ Everyone's scared of ticks and won't let their dogs go in the grass..! But thanks to the HATE ME series, Bapburi has never gotten a tick attached 🫶

reviews.name: 복실
reviews.content:
복실이는 프로 산책러인데요 🦊봄여름가을겨울 하루도 빼먹지 않고 산책합니다 ~!
다른 계절은 괜찮지만, 여름에는 가장 큰 걱정이 있는데요 ! 바로 진드기랑 벌레..😖
하네스에 헤잇미 밴드를 채워두면 발향력이 좋아서 따로 신경 쓸 일 없어요!!
실리콘 밴드형에 한번 더 고정할 수 있는 서브 밴드가 있어서 안 빠지더라구요 👏
그리고 이번에 디자인이 변경되었는데, 너무 귀여워요 ㅋㅋㅋㅋ ~~
reviews.content_en:
Bogsili is a pro walker 🦊 and doesn't skip a single day of walking - spring, summer, fall, or winter~!
Other seasons are fine, but summer is my biggest concern! That's ticks and bugs..😖
When I put the HATE ME band on the harness, the scent throw is so good that I don't have to worry about anything!!
It's a silicone band type with an extra sub-band to secure it further, so it doesn't slip off 👏
And the design changed this time, and it's so cute ㅋㅋㅋㅋ~~

reviews.name: 루이
reviews.content:
핑크 러버 루이 ,, 💗 이번 헤잇미 밴드도 핑크로 장만했어요 !
일단 곰돌이가 너무 귀여워서 마음에 쏘~옥 들었답니다 ㅎㅎㅎ
눈에 잘 보이는 컬러다 보니까 지나가던 견주님께서 무슨 제품이냐고 물어보셨어요 🤣
헤잇미 밴드 달아두면 괜히 안심이 되는 느낌 ?! 풀숲 산책도 두렵지 않아요 ! 🙌
루이는 매일 매일 산책을 나가기 때문에 한달 주기로 교체해주려고 합니당 !
reviews.content_en:
Pink rubber Louis,, 💗 I got the new HATE ME band in pink too!
First, the bear is so cute that I fell head over heels for it ㅎㅎㅎ
Since it's a color that stands out, a dog owner passing by asked me what product it was 🤣
Wearing the HATE ME band just makes me feel reassured?! I'm not even scared of grass walks now! 🙌
Since Louis goes for walks every single day, I'm planning to replace it every month!

reviews.name: alttomon
reviews.content:
북실북실하고 까만 털이라 진드기나 뭐가 붙어도 티가 잘 안나 특히 봄~가을철 구충약과 헤잇미시리즈는 아침저녁으로 잊지 않는 필수템인데요!! 역시 헤잇미다운 강력한 발향력이라 벌써부터 맘이 든든합니다🥰 
스프레이파지만 오랜 시간 외출할 때를 고려해 패치, 밴드도 항상 챙겨주고 있어요. 2년 넘게 쓰고 있지만 헤잇미 밴드는 짱짱한 실리콘밴드 덕에 아무리 잔디에서 뛰뛰하고 데굴거려도 안떨어지더라고요. 겸댕이 젤리곰에 컬러도 너무 귀여운조합이라 4종으로 하네스,목줄 색 맞춰서 구비해놓으려고요😎
reviews.content_en:
With fluffy black fur, ticks and stuff don't show even if they stick, so especially from spring to fall, flea medicine and HATE ME series are must-haves I don't forget morning and night!! As expected of HATE ME, it has that strong powerful scent throw, so I'm already feeling confident 🥰
While the spray is the main one, I always carry the patch and band too for longer outings. I've been using it for over 2 years, and because of the super sturdy silicone band, the HATE ME band doesn't fall off even when my pup runs around and rolls in the grass. The jelly bear color combo is so cute too, so I'm planning to get all 4 types to match the harness and leash colors 😎

reviews.name: 예****
reviews.content:
평소에 자주 사용하는 하네스 색상에 맞춰 ‘피치’ 컬러를 사용했어요!!
포장을 뜯자마자 올라오는 시트로넬라향이 전혀 부담스럽지 않으면서도 강력해서 요즘같이 벌레, 진드기 걱정되는 시기에 딱이에요👍
포장된 길보다 풀숲을 워낙 좋아해서 항상 산책 다녀올 때 마다 온몸 구석구석 살펴보기 바빴는데 헤잇미 밴드 덕에 확실히 안심이 되네요🥹
투박한 형태가 아닌 귀여운 곰돌이 모양에 실리콘 소재라 이곳저곳 달기도 편리하고 정말 만족스럽습니다!
같은 모양의 패치도 나왔던데 깔맞춤 해서 쓰면 2중으로 보호하고 너무 좋겠어요💗
reviews.content_en:
I chose the 'peach' color to match the harness color I usually use!!
The citronella scent that comes up right when you open it is powerful without being overwhelming, and it's perfect for these days when bugs and ticks are a concern 👍
Since my pup loves grass way more than paved paths, I've always been busy checking every corner of his body after every walk, but thanks to the HATE ME band, I feel much more reassured 🥹
It's not a bulky shape but a cute bear design with silicone material, so it's easy to attach here and there, and I'm really satisfied!
I heard a matching patch came out too, and if I use them as a coordinating set, it would be double protection and so great 💗

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 바잇미 자체 개발 디자인이라니 ,, 메론🍈💚색상 진짜 심쿵이에요오!! 이렇게 귀여워도 되는지ㅠㅠ 해충이 싫어하는 시트로넬라 오일로 향 지속력도 2~3개월 이라니 !! 넘 좋아요ㅎㅎ 실리콘 밴드형으로 엄청 가볍고 사랑스러워오,, 산책 열심히 나가고 싶네요오 ..🍈🍀💚최고에용!!
reviews.content_en: It's BITE ME's own developed design,, the melon 🍈💚 color is seriously making my heart flutter!! How can it be this cute ㅠㅠ And the scent lasts 2-3 months with citronella oil that bugs hate!! So good ㅎㅎ It's a silicone band type so it's super light and adorable,, I want to go for walks more often..🍈🍀💚 Best ever!!

reviews.name: 홍****
reviews.content: 보라보라한 색감이 매력적인 바잇미 헤잇미 밴드를 새로 샀는데, 디자인이 정말 앙증맞고 귀여워서 볼 때마다 심쿵이에요! 💜ㅋㅋㅋ 산책할 때 착용해주니 확실히 해충들이 안 꼬이는 것 같아 효과도 대만족입니다. 재구매의사 완전 있어요. 덕분에 요즘 벌레 걱정 없이 안심하고 신나게 풀숲 산책을 즐기고 있어요. 스타일과 기능성을 모두 잡은 꿀템이라 산책길이 더 완벽해진 기분이에요! 🐾✨
reviews.content_en: I recently bought the BITE ME HATE ME band in this gorgeous purple shade, and every time I see it, my heart just skips a beat because the design is so adorable! 💜ㅋㅋㅋ When I wear it during walks, it definitely seems to keep the bugs away - the effectiveness is totally satisfying. I'd definitely repurchase it. Thanks to it, I can now enjoy grass trail walks without worrying about bugs! It's a must-have item that nails both style and function, making our walks feel perfect! 🐾✨

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 진드기가 나오기 시작한 더워지는 날씨에 울 친구들 진드기 퇴치용품은 잘챙기고 있지?🥰 앙꼬는 바잇미 체험단으로 헤잇미 밴드를 선물받았어! 가볍기도 하고 목줄이나 리드줄에 착용해서 최대 60일까지 사용할 수 있고 색상도 너무 예쁘고 모양은 곰돌이모양이라 너무 귀엽다구😁
reviews.content_en: As the weather gets warmer and tick season starts, you gotta make sure your furry friends have tick repellent products ready, right?🥰 Angko got the HATE ME band as a gift from being a BITE ME tester! It's lightweight, you can attach it to a collar or leash and use it for up to 60 days, the colors are so pretty, and it's shaped like a cute little bear! 😁

reviews.name: 바리
reviews.content:
풀을 너무 좋아해서 항상 진드기랑 벌레 걱정이 많았는데요 ㅜㅜ
뜯자마자 느껴지는 강력한 향에 안심이 되었습니다 ㅋㅋㅋ
그리고 실리콘 밴드형이라 잔디밭에서 뛰고 뒹굴어도 잘 달려있더라구요 !
더스트프리 코팅도 되어서 풀이나 먼지가 묻어도 잘 털렸습니다 !!
컬러도 4개나 되던데, 깔별로 쟁이려고요 ~~~ 역시 여름 산책 필수템입니다 b
reviews.content_en: My pup loves grass so much, so I was always worried about ticks and bugs 😭 But as soon as I opened it, I felt reassured by the strong scent! ㅋㅋㅋ And since it's a silicone band, it stays on well even when running and rolling around in the grass! Plus it has a dust-free coating so grass and dirt just shake right off!! There are 4 colors, so I'm planning to get them all by shade ~~~ It's definitely an essential for summer walks! b

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
진드기 때문에 걱정이 많아서 이것저것 알아보다가 디자인이 너무 귀여워서 한번 써보게 됐어요 🤍
어차피 쓰는 거 꼬솜이한테 잘 어울리는 귀여운 걸로 해주고 싶었는데 생각보다 더 만족 중이에요!

꼬솜이가 풀밭이나 흙길, 잔디 있는 곳을 정말 좋아해서 산책 갈 때마다 걱정됐거든요🥺
안 가게 하기엔 너무 신나하는 게 보여서 마음이 쓰였는데, 사용한 뒤로는 한 달 동안 진드기 붙은 적 없이 잘 산책하고 있어요!

물론 운이 좋은 걸 수도 있겠지만 보호자 입장에서는 마음이 훨씬 편해진 느낌이에요 :)
게다가 디자인도 귀엽다 보니 산책룩처럼 잘 어울려서 사진 찍을 때도 만족도 최고예요 🐶💛

이번엔 다른 향으로도 한번 써보려고 해요!
reviews.content_en:
I was so worried about ticks that I looked into different options, and I decided to try it because the design was just too cute 🤍 Since my pup was going to wear it anyway, I wanted something adorable that would suit them well, and I'm honestly even more satisfied than I expected!

Sokkomie loves grass, dirt paths, and grassy areas so much that I was worried every time we went for a walk 🥺 I didn't want to stop them because they looked so excited, but since using this, we've had a whole month of walks without a single tick!

Of course, it could just be good luck, but as a pet parent, my peace of mind has totally improved :) Plus, the design is so cute that it looks like part of our walking outfit, so I'm super happy when taking photos too 🐶💛

Next time I want to try it in a different scent!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 산책할때 필수템인데 디자인까지 귀여워서 맘에 들어요! 좋은향이 솔솔 해충은 바이바이
reviews.content_en: It's an essential for our walks and the design is so cute too, I love it! The nice scent keeps pests away bye-bye

reviews.name: 구****
reviews.content: 겨울빼고 애용하는 바잇미 헤잇미밴드!! 푸딩이도 쭈욱 해왔던거라 거부감 전혀 없이 소다색으로 착용하고 오늘도 산책을 즐겁게 했답니다! 벌레와 해충 걱정없이 안전한 산책에 도움이 되는데 안살수가 있나유🩵(보호자의 헤잇미밴드도 만들어주세유ㅎㅎ)
reviews.content_en: BITE ME HATE ME band that we use year-round except in winter!! Pudding has been using it all along so there's no resistance at all - today with the soda color on, we enjoyed our walk! It really helps with safe walks without worrying about bugs and pests, so how could I not buy it?🩵 (could you also make a HATE ME band for the pet parent? hehe)

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content:
저희 석탄이 산책 필수템입니다! 요즘 날씨가 따뜻해서져서 
진드기 때문에 걱정 많아서 꼭 착용하고 나간답니다!
향도 은은해서 좋어용!! 색과 모양도 귀여워서 대만족입니다:)
reviews.content_en: It's an essential for Seoktan's walks! The weather's been getting warmer lately so I always make sure to wear it because of ticks! The scent is subtle and nice too!! I'm totally satisfied with the colors and shape :)

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 해마다 여름이되면 애용하는 제품입니다^^배송도 너무 빠르고 효과가 좋아 다시 주문했어요 정말  효과 좋고   편하고 좋아요~^^♡♡
reviews.content_en: It's a product I use every summer 😊 The shipping was so fast and it works great, so I ordered again. It really works well and is convenient and great ~^^♡♡

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 강아지 산책갈때 필요해서 구매했어요 모기퇴치 향 엄청 강하고 부착하기도 참 편해요 디자인도 귀엽고 아주 만족 합니다!
reviews.content_en: I bought it because I need it for dog walks. The mosquito repellent scent is really strong and it's super easy to attach. The design is cute too and I'm very satisfied!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
해마다 여름이면 타사에서 해충방비클립을 구매했었는데 꼭 쓰다보면 잃어버려서 속상했거든요.
그런데 바잇미는 잃어버리지 않을거 같네요. 고정도 확실하고 가벼워서 부담없고 디자인까지 너무 귀엽네요. 매우 만족합니다.
reviews.content_en: Every summer I used to buy pest repellent clips from other brands, but I'd always lose them which was frustrating. But with BITE ME, I don't think I'll lose this. The attachment is secure, it's lightweight so there's no burden, and the design is so cute. I'm very satisfied.

reviews.name: S****
reviews.content:
귀엽고 튼튼해보여요
올여름 걱정없이 지낼거 같아요:)
reviews.content_en: It's cute and looks really sturdy. I think we'll get through this summer without any worries :)

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content:
착용 방법도 간단한데 고정력이 너무 좋아서 공놀이 하느라
미친듯이 뛰어다녀도 빠지거나 하지는 않더라구요! 무엇보다
디자인이 넘나 기여워요..ㅜ
reviews.content_en: It's super easy to put on, and the grip is so good that even when he's running around like crazy playing fetch, it doesn't fall off at all! Plus, the design is absolutely adorable.. ㅜ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 작년에 사서 쓰보고 좋아서 다시 재구매했어요  잘쓰고 있는데 산책도중 잃어버려서 여름이 다가오니 꼭 필요해서 구매했어요 배송 빠르고 가격 착하게 잘구매했어요
reviews.content_en: I bought it last year, liked it, and repurchased it. I've been using it well, but I lost it during a walk, and since summer's coming up, I really needed to get another one. Fast shipping and great price—really happy with my purchase!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 디자인이 마음에 들어서 선택했어요. 산책 나갈때 진드기나 벌레 신경쓰이는데 효과 있었으면 좋겠어요. 색상은 모두 예쁘네요. 향도 괜찮아요
reviews.content_en: I chose it because I loved the design. I get worried about ticks and bugs on walks, so I hope it's effective. All the colors are pretty. The scent is nice too.

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 작년에 산책하면서 진드기가 얼굴에 다리에 붙은걸 보고 미리 구매했어요 귀엽기도 하고 착용이 편할거 같아 좋아요 가격도 할인해사 만족합니다
reviews.content_en: Last year during a walk, I saw a tick on my pup's face and legs, so I bought this ahead of time. It's cute and seems easy to wear, which I love. Really satisfied with the discounted price too!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
동네 챙기는 아이들 하나씩 달아줬어요
밖에있는애들이라 걱정이었는데
부디 효과좋길바래봅니다
5아이라서 한세트더구매하러고요
reviews.content_en: I gave one to each of the neighborhood kids' pets. I was worried since they're outside a lot, so I'm really hoping it works well. Since I have 5 kids, I'm planning to buy another set.

reviews.name: 고****
reviews.content:
하네스나 목줄에 쉽게 걸 수 있어서 편리했어요!
스프레이 뿌리고 밴드까지 차고
여름 나들이 뛰뛰 준비 완벽하다!🙈
reviews.content_en: It's easy to clip onto a harness or leash, so it's super convenient! Spray it on, add the band, and boom—all set for summer outings! 🙈

reviews.name: 채****
reviews.content:
예방 차원에서 꼭 하고 나가는 해충방지 클립이에요♡ 
부착이 쉬워요
reviews.content_en: It's a bug-prevention clip that I always wear before heading out as a precaution ♡ It's easy to attach.

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 흑흑 한번 잃어버려서 재구매... 좀 잘 떨어지는 것 같은데,,, 근데 디자인 귀여워서 다시 구매했어요 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: I lost it once so I had to rebuy... It seems to fall off pretty easily,,,, but the design is so cute that I bought it again ㅠㅠ

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 냄새가 강하긴 한데 클립타입으로 아주 유용합니다!! 이번 여름 필수템~!
reviews.content_en: The scent is pretty strong, but it's super useful as a clip type!! Summer essential this year~!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 가격도 저렴하고 배송도 빨랐어요😍😍 다음에 또 구매할게요 많이파세요🔥🔥🔥
reviews.content_en: The price is great and shipping was fast😍😍 I'll definitely buy again next time. Stock up on these!🔥🔥🔥

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 강쥐가 풀 숲에서 볼일을 보기 때문에 가슴에 달아 줫더니, 확실하게 쥐며느리, 날파리, 모기 등.. 가까이 오려다가 멀리 날아가더라구만.. 효과 만점.. 재 주문 희망!!
reviews.content_en: Since my pup does his business in the grass, I attached it to his chest, and it definitely works! Pillbugs, gnats, mosquitoes, etc. all try to come near but fly away instead.. Perfect results.. Would definitely reorder!!

reviews.name: 주****
reviews.content: 산책하는데 이제 날벌레들도 많이 날아 다니고 진드기도 나오기 시작했어요ㅜ 이제 패치 하나에 의지할 계절은 끝난거 같아서 클립을 구매했어요!! 아직 사용전이지만 모양이 너무 귀여우니 일단 합격입니다! 효과도 좋았으면 좋겠어용!
reviews.content_en: On walks lately there are so many flying insects and ticks are starting to appear ㅜ Since relying on just one patch seems like it's reached the end of the season, I decided to get the clip!! I haven't used it yet but it's so cute in design that it's already a pass! Hope it works well too!

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 너무귀여워요! 색도 귀엽구용
reviews.content_en: So adorable! The color is cute too!

reviews.name: 최****
reviews.content:
예쁜 퇴치제 클립 사고 싶었는데 이번에 산 보라색 하네스랑 너무 찰떡이예요 ㅎㅎ
4가지색 모드 샀는데 향도 진하고 한여름에 안심하고 산책할거 같아요!
reviews.content_en: I wanted to buy a pretty pest repellent clip and the purple harness I bought this time matches it perfectly ㅎㅎ I got all 4 colors and the scent is strong, so I think I can take walks worry-free in the middle of summer!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 진드기 요즘 난리라길래 세가지 색 모두 구매해서 쓰고있습니다 ㅎㅎ향이 머리아프고 그러지 않아요 강아지도 이거 덕에 해충이 안오는것 같아여
reviews.content_en: Heard ticks are crazy these days so I bought and am using all three colors ㅎㅎ The scent isn't overpowering or cause headaches. Seems like my pup doesn't get bothered by pests because of this!

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content:
오늘 비가와서 아직 사용 안 해봤는데 ㅠ__ㅠ
다른 곳 해충밴드보다 디자인이 너무너무 귀여워용🐻

우리애기랑 너무 잘 어울릴 것 같은 트랜디함 굿💕
reviews.content_en: It rained today so haven't tried it yet ㅠ__ㅠ The design is SO much cuter than pest bands from other places🐻 Looks like it'll match so well with my baby. Love the trendy vibe💕

reviews.name: 권****
reviews.content: 총알배송 감사해요ㅎㅎ 이거 너무 귀엽게 생겼어요옹!!! 이따가 착용하고 나가봐야 겠어요😆 올해는 진드기로부터 더 안전한 해가 되길🌸
reviews.content_en: Thanks for the speedy delivery ㅎㅎ This looks so adorable!!! I should put it on and go out in a bit😆 Hope this year is safer from ticks for us🌸

reviews.name: 김****
reviews.content: 산책나갈때 필수템이에요.냄새도 잘 나고 그랗다고 독하지는 않아서 좋습니다 산책 후에는 밀봉해서 보관하고 있습니다
reviews.content_en: It's a must-have for walks. The scent is strong but not overpowering, which is great. I keep it sealed and stored after each walk.

reviews.name: 한****
reviews.content: 3마리라서 세트로 구매했는데 너무 귀여워요 색도 예뻐요 3마리가 다 풀을 엄청 좋아하는데 효과 있었으면 좋겠어요
reviews.content_en: Got a set since I have 3 pups and it's so cute! The colors are pretty too. All 3 love grass a lot so I hope it's effective!

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content:
여름마다 사는 건데 세일하고 있어서 케로피 옷 사면서 같이 샀어요 
이것만 엄청 배송이 빨리 왔네요 짱이당
reviews.content_en: I buy this every summer, and since it was on sale, I got it along with some Keroppi clothes. The shipping for this was surprisingly fast! 👍

reviews.name: 임****
reviews.content: 바잇미 헤잇미 밴드가 제일 좋아요! 리뉴얼 된 제품이 너무 예쁘고 귀여워용 ㅎㅎ 아이한테 찰떡입니당
reviews.content_en: I love the BITE ME HATE ME band the most! The renewed product is so pretty and cute hehe 😊 It's perfect for my pup!

reviews.name: 송****
reviews.content: 쓰던제품이고 봄이되서 새걸로 갈아주려고 구매..끼우기 편하고 한번더 잡아주게되여서 한번도 빠진적없어요
reviews.content_en: I was using the old one, and since spring came around, I decided to switch to a new one. It's easy to put on and it holds really securely, so it's never fallen off once.

reviews.name: 박****
reviews.content: 작년에 써보고 산책시 빠지지 않고 넘 예뻐 출시 되자마자 구매했어요. 리뉴얼 제품도 넘 예쁘네ㅛ.
reviews.content_en: I tried it last year and it never falls off during walks—it's so pretty! I bought it right when the new version came out. The renewed product looks amazing too 😊

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 좋아여 좋아요 향이 좋대요 다들 ㅎㅎ 그리고 효과 확실히 있습니다
reviews.content_en: Love it, love it! The scent is great too, everyone says so hehe 😄 And the effectiveness is definitely there.

reviews.name: 이****
reviews.content: 좋아요. 색도 예쁘고 귀엽네요. 선책하느게 두렵지 않겠어료,,
reviews.content_en: I like it. The color is pretty and cute. I won't be nervous about going on walks anymore 😊

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 색깔도 부담스럽지않고 냄새도 그렇게 심하지않아서좋아요
reviews.content_en: The color isn't too overwhelming and the smell isn't too strong either, so I really like it.

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 디자인도 너무 귀엽고 싼 가격에 잘 산거 같아요 ㅠㅠ
reviews.content_en: The design is so cute and for such a cheap price, I feel like I got a great deal 😭

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 여름이 다가와서 애기들 산책때 쓰려고 구매했어요! 디자인이 너무 귀여워용
reviews.content_en: With summer coming up, I bought this for my kids' walks! The design is so adorable 💕

reviews.name: 네****
reviews.content: 향이 강하지읺고 편아게 잘사용이 되어서 좋습니다
reviews.content_en: The scent isn't overpowering and it's convenient to use, so I'm happy with it.
